CustomField.description: Disables the form templates compiling the JSON of the pages, sections, questions and conditions. This should be used during import and export exercises when dealing with large forms.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Disables the form templates compiling the JSON of the pages, sections, questions and conditions. This should be used during import and export exercises when dealing with large forms.
CustomField.label: Disable Form Template JSON Trigger
